rules.label: Means of Egress – General
rules.notes_template: NFPA 1 references NFPA 101 for means of egress; coordinate occupant load posting, exit access, and emergency lighting requirements.
rules.citation: NFPA 1 2024 §13 – Adopts NFPA 101 means-of-egress requirements with state/AHJ amendments.
rules.remediation: Coordinate egress drawings with NFPA 1 and NFPA 101 requirements.

rules.label: Hazardous Materials – Control Areas & MAQ
rules.notes_template: Verify hazmat control areas and maximum allowable quantities per §60; classification of HazMat triggers Group H IBC scoping.
rules.citation: NFPA 1 2024 §60 – Hazardous materials thresholds and control-area protections.
rules.remediation: Inventory hazmats and apply control-area limits.
